elements.sent-2411-004: The study of Poincare inequalities is a central theme in analysis, in particular, they play a relevant role in partial differential equations and mathematical physics.
elements.sent-2411-005: In recent years, proving discrete analogues of classical analytic inequalities has attracted the attention of many authors, see for instance \cite{GM ,\cite{GM2 ,\cite{ST1 .}}}
elements.sent-2411-006: In particular, in \cite{IV and \cite{ILVV the optimal constant for Poincare inequalities on the hypercube was studied.}}
elements.sent-2411-007: In \cite{LSTV the Poincare inequalities constant grow on graphs was studied.}
elements.sent-2411-008: Poincare inequalities also appear naturally when studying isoperimetric inequalities \cite{BG .}
elements.sent-2411-009: In this paper, we establish optimal Poincare-Wirtinger type inequalities on complete graphs and we characterize the extremizers.
elements.sent-2411-010: That is the content of our main result.
